reason: Fase N wave 2 (same 0.0.0 baseline as 003-components-marsui-language and 004-fase-n-wave1; this declaration advances the sealed candidate, so the cumulative delta stays MAJOR because the V.2 deliberate effective-value changes remain part of this candidate). The wave adds four additive simple elements - no new composite groups - none of which grows the frozen legacy root barrel: all ship only via direct subpaths. ki-scroller (attributes: label/orientation; part: viewport; documented default slot for the scrollable content; component tokens --ki-scroller-{thumb-color,thumb-thickness,thumb-min-length,thumb-radius,track-color,track-inset,gutter,surface} plus the focus-ring triple, 11 leaves in both themes) per approved spec 023-ki-scroller. ki-indicator (attributes: count/current/label; parts: indicator/dot/dot-current; component tokens --ki-indicator-{dot-block-size,dot-inline-size,dot-color,dot-radius}, the dot-current {inline-size,block-size,hole-block-size,color,radius} quintet, gap and motion-duration, 11 leaves in both themes) per approved spec 024-ki-indicator. ki-video (attribute: label; parts: frame/play; documented default slot reserved for the consumer's native video element - both wave slots entered the documented surface after the Codex review of PR #55 so shipped metadata names where content must go; component tokens --ki-video-{frame-radius,play-size,play-icon-size,play-radius,play-bg,play-fg,play-border-color,play-border-width,play-shadow,scrim-color,scrim-radius,scrim-padding,backdrop-blur,motion-duration} plus the focus-ring triple, 17 leaves in both themes, reusing the verified ki-icon-button glass semantics 1:1) per approved spec 025-ki-video. ki-qr (attributes: value/label; part: code; encoding is local via a minimal vendored byte-mode/level-M adaptation of Project Nayuki's MIT reference encoder - provenance, license and reference sha256 recorded in NOTICE, zero runtime npm dependencies per Art. X; jsqr 1.4.0 enters devDependencies only as the independent decoder for browser round-trip tests; component tokens --ki-qr-{size,color,background,quiet-zone,radius,module-radius,finder-radius}, 7 leaves in both themes) per approved spec 026-ki-qr. The tokens surface grows 1262 -> 1308 leaves (+46); both stylesheet budgets hold inside the declared 11 KB (brotli: onmars 10.73 KB, material3 10.94 KB - no budget change). Declared deviations pending founder ratification (each recorded in the spec's design-extraction.md): the scroller thumb Blur/24 and the video e4/e6 elevation stacks discarded (021 glass-containment precedent); the video poster-fallback gradient discarded (wave 1 text-avatar precedent) and the md variant read as the canonical scale; the constitutional-surface parenthetical extensions inside the declared token families (scroller track-inset/focus-ring, indicator current-dot block sizes, video scrim/play-border/shadow/blur/focus/motion); the indicator FR-012 contrast conflict (Inverse_white/alpha_18 over s0 at ~1.4:1) raised as fidelity-vs-3:1 for the merge gate; the QR scheme-stable ink #0a0c11 -> #000000 on a self-owned white tile as the FR-010 theme obligation, size resolved to the 120px space step for the 128px frame, the finder-ring stroke reproduction within 0.15 modules (the 0.687 round-dot inset deferred as a possible additive MINOR) and the vendored encoder itself (Art. X explicit signature). Nothing is published yet (0.0.0, private).
